subject: [PATCH v7 04/20] nfsd: allow nfsd to get a dir lease with an ignore mask

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch allows the NFS server to obtain a directory lease with an ignore mask, enabling it to selectively ignore certain events such as file creation, deletion, and renaming. This is achieved by modifying the nfsd_get_dir_deleg function to pass the requested notification types to the nfs4_alloc_init_lease function, which sets the corresponding flags in the file lease. The patch also introduces a new function, nfsd_notify_to_ignore, that maps notification types to their corresponding ignore mask bits.
